case_title: SPECIALIZED LEGAL SERVICES, INC. VS MARSHALL SUZUKI LAW GROUP

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHALL SUZUKI LAW GROUP
